name: Cosmic Mirage
short_description: Welcome to the exciting universe of Cosmic Mirage, where incredible space battles await you. Free the captured planets from the dark forces of the galactic conquerors.
detailed_description:
Cosmic Mirage is an exciting side-view scrolling shooter that takes the player on an exciting space adventure. Sinister forces have captured peaceful planets in the galaxy, turning them into empty space mirages. Your mission is to become the last reliable airplane pilot and free them from the sinister invader.

You will have an epic journey through a variety of landscapes and battles with different types of enemies. Planets that were once a source of life and prosperity have now become places of darkness and struggle. Each world presents unique challenges, and the trapped inhabitants need your liberating intervention.

Features of the game:
-Dynamic space battles: Fight in thrilling battles while driving a powerful and customizable space plane.
-Diverse levels: Explore different planets and their unique landscapes, fighting against a variety of opponents and bosses.
-Upgrades and modifications: Earn experience points and resources to improve your aircraft by adding new ones
